293 GG0100A_PRIOR_SELF_CARE_IND GG0100A_PRIOR_SELF_CARE_IND GG0100A Prior Functioning - Self Care Code - The data in this column identifies the patient's ability for self care prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the patient's ability for self care
